rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should use visible feature names and avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths.
AGREE annexes must reference only identifiers present in the AADL model's scope.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or data types not found in the analyzed AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings require placement in component implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not use event ports in numeric or Boolean comparisons without explicit data values.
